name: 3-Day Tour: Fes → Sahara → Marrakech via Atlas & Ait Ben Haddou

seo.title: 3-Day Fes to Marrakech Tour via the Sahara — Merzouga, Dades, Ait Ben Haddou | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 3-day tour from Fes to Marrakech: Ifrane, Azrou forest, Merzouga desert (Erg Chebbi), Todra Gorges, Dades, Valley of Roses, Ait Ben Haddou, Tizi n'Tichka.

hero.tagline: Fes → Merzouga → Marrakech: the great Moroccan South

intro: This 3-day tour connects Fes to Marrakech through the desert and southern valleys. Along the way: the Middle Atlas, Erg Chebbi in Merzouga, the Todra Gorges, the Dades Valley, the Valley of Roses, the ksar of Ait Ben Haddou and the Tizi n'Tichka pass. One of the most popular itineraries in Morocco.
